case_title: CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. JAMES L. LANDON et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-15-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-06-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDON, JAMES L. $6,055.14 PRINCIPAL, $160.92 INTEREST, $248.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,464.06, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
